ciphers.text: Mackenzie appears in the model city scene — the same model Frasier builds in his Magician card
ciphers.encoding_hint: Mackenzie sees Frasier's miniature D'Ambrosio's-empire diorama. May provide commentary the player can dig out via her portrait's cipher reveals.

notes: Sparse hooks until more of her prose is mined for puzzle-worthy elements.
